title: Mesochlaena javanica

This species of fern is classified as an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants such as trees. Mesochlaena javanica is further classified as a member of the genus Mesochlaena, which contains several species of ferns. The classification of Mesochlaena javanica is based on its unique characteristics and morphological features, including its leaf structure and habitat.
